title: WOMEN'S MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH WOMEN'S MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides evaluation and counseling services. Topics include perinatal and postpartum depression, stress related disorders, relationship and sexuality concerns, perinatal loss, and bereavement. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Women of all ages Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (503) 418-4500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance. Offers a sliding scale fees for those who qualify. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: OHSU Center for Women's Health, located on the 7th floor of the Peter O. Kohler Pavilion on the OHSU Marquam Hill Campus. Services: Bereavement and Grief Counseling Individual Counseling Perinatal Mood and Anxiety Disorders Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES HUMAN REPRODUCTION - CHILDBIRTH AND PARENTING PREPARATION CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH
